title: Opendoor Q4 2024 and Full Year Financial Results
text: Opendoor Technologies Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results. Opendoor reported $5.2 billion in revenue in 2024, a 26% decrease from 2023, with a net loss of $392 million. However, the company achieved a significant reduction in Adjusted Net Loss, decreasing from $(778) million in 2023 to $(258) million in 2024. Key metrics included a contribution profit of $242 million, a sharp recovery from a loss in the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA was negative but improved significantly year-over-year. The company increased homes purchased and improved margins in the latter part of the year, setting the stage for the profitability improvements highlighted in the 2025 earnings announcements.
